CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Sep-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances [telephonic conference call]: Hyura Choi, counsel for Plaintiff Lee; Brian Danitz, counsel for Defendants Conway, et al.

Court and counsel confer regarding e-mail exchanges concerning discovery issues. Cross-Defendant Refactor Capital GP, LLC ("Refactor") seeks an Order extending the deadline for Refactor to file a motion to compel Cross-Complainants to further respond to Refactor's First Set of Form Interrogatories and Special Interrogatories. The current statutory deadline is September 18, 2018. Refactor seeks an extension to October 5, 2018. After discussion, the Court will allow a ten-day extension to September 28, 2018 on the Motion to Compel.

Mr. Danitz further notes issues with the Plaintiff's responses to document production requests ["RFPs"], including assertions concerning the "Trade Secrets" statutes, and also requests an extension of time to file a Motion to Compel. The Court notes that a "trade secrets" objection should be limited only to those requests that are particularly directed at trade secrets. After discussion, the Court defers the Defendants' request for extension of time on its Motion to Compel, orders counsel to meet and confer on their respection discovery requests, authorizes counsel to request a discovery conference for next week.

Judge: Hon. Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)
